---
title: "Modelling Approaches"
---

For each challenge below, we describe what modelling approaches are available, what data they need, and when they are most useful.
For mathematical details and computational properties, see the companion technical overview.

| Challenge | Approaches | Description |
|---|---|---|
| [Correcting delayed data](reporting-delays.qmd) | Simple, Multiplicative, Regression, Generative, Other statistical | Adjust for right-truncation caused by delays between events and their reports |
| [Managing data revisions](data-revisions.qmd) | @placeholder | Handle retrospective changes to previously reported data |
| [Site drop-in and drop-out](site-drop-in-out.qmd) | @placeholder | Account for facilities joining or leaving the surveillance system |
| [Other data quality issues](other-data-quality.qmd) | @placeholder | Address missing dates, format incompatibilities, and deduplication |

: {.striped .hover}
